name: Ethereal Crescent (Greater)
description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

This crescent-shaped shard of iridescent metal is strangely translucent, fading to a blurry outline when examined for too long. A weapon under the effects of a greater ethereal crescent gains the effects of an rune for 1 minute. This does not count against the weapon's normal maximum number of runes.
